Title (large text): Fast-Acting Happiness Capsule
A capsule pill with a green top in Starbucks green and a transparent bottom, printed with the Starbucks logo. Inside the capsule are numerous coffee beans.
Description (small text): Take when feeling sad or down. Three times a day, two capsules per dose.
Buy button: Same color as the capsule.
Below the button, display the price: $9.
Please follow medical advice and purchase as needed.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/ZHO_ZHO_ZHO/status/1911724629460455896)

## Example Output
![Happy Capsule](/media/3d/happy-capsule-creation.webp)
description_en: Image-generation prompt for a playful mock product page of a 'happiness capsule' pill filled with coffee beans in Starbucks-style green.
description_zh: 图像生成提示词，生成一张趣味仿制品页：装满咖啡豆、星巴克绿配色的'快乐胶囊'药丸。
long_en: Lays out a fake e-commerce listing with a large title, dosage description, a buy button and a $9 price for a transparent capsule of coffee beans. A pure creative mockup for a text-to-image model.
long_zh: 为一颗装着咖啡豆的透明胶囊排版出仿电商详情：大标题、用量说明、购买按钮和 9 美元价格。纯创意仿制图，面向文生图模型。
sec_note_en: Requires a text-to-image model; it references third-party brand visuals (Starbucks), so reusing generated images commercially may raise trademark concerns.
sec_note_zh: 需要文生图模型；引用了第三方品牌元素（星巴克），商用再利用成图可能涉及商标问题。
